text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was just looking out over the camp. I've learned
many things here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've improved so much and gained so many skills
training with you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Never mind. There will come a time for this
conversation, but for now...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's hold our heads high and advance toward the
race my parents are so looking forward to—the
autumn Tenno Sho.
